Package doghotel

package doghotel
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Date
    The Date Class represents a date as 3 int values for month, day, and year.
    Dog
    A class to represent a Dog.
    DogHotel

    Pet
    A class to represent a Pet as an extension of Dog.
